records.ety: [L. parapegma, Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ to fix beside; para` beside + <?/ to fix: cf. F. parapegme.]

defs: An engraved tablet, usually of brass, set up in a public place.
notes: ☞ Parapegms were used for the publication of laws, proclamations, etc., and the recording of astronomical phenomena or calendar events.
